zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford於1332年6月16日出生在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可時，她的父親Edward III King of England19歲，母親Philippa de Hainault Queen of England18歲。她於1365年7月27日與Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1379年4月2日在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford于1332年6月16日出生在英国奧可福爾武德斯托可时，她的父亲Edward III King of England19岁，母亲Philippa de Hainault Queen of England18岁。她于1365年7月27日与Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1379年4月2日在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Bedford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county seat of Bedfordshire, or a smaller place of the same name in Lancashire, or from Bedforth in Thornhill, Yorkshire. Both of the former are named with the Old English personal name Bēda + Old English ford ‘ford’. The name is now very common in Yorkshire as well as Bedfordshire.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: of

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Woodstock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Hertfordshire): habitational name from Woodstock in Oxfordshire, or Woodstock in Tunstall (Kent). The placenames derive from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + stoc ‘place’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford was born on 16 June 1332, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Edward III King of England, was 19 and her mother, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, was 18. She married Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford on 27 July 1365, in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 2 April 1379, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford est née le 16 juin 1332, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward III King of England, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford le 27 juillet 1365, à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1379, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford am 16. Juni 1332 in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward III King of England 19 und ihre Mutter Philippa de Hainault Queen of England 18. Sie hat am 27. Juli 1365 in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. April 1379 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England und wurde in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford è nata il il 16 giugno 1332 nel Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Edward III King of England, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford il 27 luglio 1365, nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 aprile 1379, nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedfordが1332年6月16日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックで生まれた時，父Edward III King of Englandは19歳，母Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandは18歳であった。1365年7月27日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルでEnguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1379年4月2日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford(이)가 1332년 6월 16일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward III King of England(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1365년 7월 27일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 4월 2일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford nasceu em 16 de junho de 1332, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward III King of England, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford em 27 de julho de 1365, em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1379, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford родилась 16 июня 1332 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward III King of England было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford 27 июля 1365 г. в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 апреля 1379 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford nació el 16 de junio de 1332, en Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward III King of England, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford el 27 de julio de 1365, en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1379, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
